title: AI News Jun 30 — Meituan open sources LongCat-2.0, the 1.6T, n
description: Imagine a world where AI models are no longer controlled by a select few, but are free for anyone to use and improve. That world just got a whole lot closer, thanks to Chinese delivery app company Meituan, which has just open-sourced its LongCat-2.0 model. This 1.6T near-frontier agentic coding model has been leading the way on OpenRouter, and the fact that it was trained entirely on Chinese chips is a significant milestone. It shows that countries like China are making strides in AI development...

title: AI News Jun 29 — Prompt injection is exploiting enterprise AI'
description: Imagine a world where the most powerful AI systems are being exploited by cybercriminals, targeting the very heart of enterprise AI - that's the reality we're facing today. title: AI News Jun 29 — Prompt injection is exploiting enterprise AI'
description: The AI revolution is in full swing, but a dark cloud is looming over the enterprise AI landscape - hackers have discovered a way to exploit the biggest design flaws in large language models, and it's got everyone on high alert. In the past two years, businesses have been rushing to integrate AI into every aspect of their operations, from support and analytics to development and automation.
